subParts.name: Sustained Investigation Images (Two Views Per Work)

unitWeights.title: Sustained Investigation: Practice, Experimentation, and Revision
Selected Works: Skillful Synthesis of Materials, Processes, and Ideas

scoringNotes: Portfolio scored by readers. Sustained Investigation (60%): 15 images (two views per 3D work) plus written responses. Selected Works (40%): 5 works demonstrating skillful synthesis. Scored on a 1-5 AP scale.

specialPolicies.deliveryNotes: No timed exam. Portfolio submitted digitally through the AP Digital Portfolio. 3D works require two views (front and back/side). Students submit throughout the course and finalize by the portfolio deadline.
